records.title: 以下のカードが破壊された場合、「<<22704>>」の『①：自分フィールドの表側表示のモンスターカードが戦闘・効果で破壊された場合に発動できる』効果を発動できますか？ （A）モン…
records.conclusion:
（A）（B）発動できます。

（C）（D）発動できません。

そのカードが存在しているところにかかわらず、モンスタートークンやペンデュラムモンスター等、元々の種類がモンスターであるカードがモンスターカードであり、元々の種類が魔法・罠カードであるカードはモンスターカードではありません。
（「モンスターカード」とは元々の性質がモンスターであるカードを指します。）

モンスターゾーンや魔法＆罠ゾーンに存在するモンスタートークンが破壊された場合、モンスターカードが破壊されたことになりますが、元々の種類が魔法・罠であるカードがモンスターゾーンで破壊されても、モンスターカードが破壊されたことにはなりません。

records.title: Can the effect of <<12950>> be activated in response when <<15296>> is activated?
records.conclusion:
In the case of <<15296>>, since it says『Activate 1 of these effects;』, when activated you must tell your opponent which『●』you're using.

If <<15296>> is activated by selecting the first effect,『●Draw 2 cards』, the effect of <<12950>> can be activated in response.
If it's activated by selecting any of the other『●』effects, the effect of <<12950>> cannot be activated in response.

● <<21059>>: the 1st『●』

records.conclusion:
Ⓐ: No, you cannot.
If a monster that was Special Summoned from the Extra Deck is changed to face-down Defense Position, it is no longer considered to be『a monster Special Summoned from the Extra Deck』. (However, that monster is still considered to be『a Special Summoned monster』.)

records.title: If <<11116>> is activated in a Chain that contains monster effects activated outside of t…
records.conclusion:
If <<11116>> is activated, and the Chain contains monster effects that activated outside of the field (such as effects activated from the hand or Graveyard), those activations are also negated. However, those monsters do not return to the Deck. (Only cards on the field that had their activation negated will be shuffled into the Deck.)

In addition, if the Chain that <<11116>> was activated in also contains the activated effect of a Spell/Trap Card in the Graveyard, or the activation effect of a Spell/Trap Card already face-up on the field, that effect will not be negated.

Note that, even if the effect activated immediately before <<11116>>'s effect is such a Spell/Trap effect, <<11116>> can still be activated, as long as a monster effect, or a Spell/Trap Card, was activated at any previous point during the Chain. (This also applies to <<6917>>.)
